creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text: (For portmgr@ -- should the exp-run passes, may I also request an approval to commit the change to individual ports that depends on openldap24-client instead of seeking approval from maintainers individually?  These are mainly to adapt with new port option.  I can revert the databases/mysql57-server/Makefile change which drops llvm 9.0 dependency, if that's considered controversial.).
